description: KumpeApps appears to provide an application platform/service with a login-backed website and a documented KKid API. Its public status page lists the main website, mail service, and API as separate service components.
summary: KumpeApps exposes one documented REST HTTP API (OpenAPI 3.0.1) at `https://restapi.kumpeapps.com/v5`, with auth mediated by KumpeApps-issued app/auth keys described in its spec; no GraphQL, MCP, or CLI surface was found.
